transcript: Dude, what's up man? So good to see you. What are you doing? Babe, what'd you have for breakfast this morning? Oh, Lucky Charms. Yeah. Hey, what's up bro? Dude, how you doing, man? Oh, you've been here? Yeah, no, I've just been here for I think about four days. Yeah, dude. Oh, really? You just got here? I need you here! Hey, Dan, what's up bro hey what's up man dude so good to see you yeah good to see you too man okay how about i go right and you go left? Okay. Sorry, I meant you go my left. So I'm going to go left, right? Right. Wait, I thought you wanted me to go right. No, I was saying right to you going left. Thanks, man. I'm going to miss you so much. Yeah, I'll miss you too. Were you perked? I'm right over there. Oh, me too. Okay. Hey, Daniel. Hey, what's up, man? Dude, how often do you come here? What? How often do you come here? What? How often do you come here? Okay. Hi, sir, would you like to donate to help save the American bullfrog? Sorry, I don't have time. Sorry. But the frogs are dying!
